name: delivroute
description: DelivRoute — B2B SaaS last-mile delivery route optimization platform
comment:react: The web app (Next 14) needs react@18; the mobile app needs react@19. Pin react@18 as a ROOT dependency so it hoists to the repo root — where Next's bundled styled-jsx resolves it, matching react-dom@18 during the web build's static export. The mobile app's react@19 (its own direct dep) nests into apps/mobile/node_modules, which Metro resolves from the app directory first, so mobile is unaffected.
